headline: Entergy Finance Shift Puts Focus On Dividend And Reporting Consistency
summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) announced the planned retirement of Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer Reginald T. Jackson. Patrick J. Stack has been appointed to succeed Jackson as Chief Accounting Officer. The leadership transition affects oversight of financial reporting and accounting functions at Entergy. Entergy, an integrated energy company serving power customers across several U.S. regions, operates at the intersection of regulated utilities and long-term grid...
